title: Lasianthaea palmeri
taxonomy: Lasianthaea palmeri is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This classification places it within the larger group of daisy-like plants. Lasianthaea palmeri is further grouped into the tribe Heliantheae, which contains a variety of sunflower and daisy species. The genus Lasianthaea is a monotypic genus, meaning that it contains only one species. This classification helps to identify and organize the unique characteristics of Lasianthaea palmeri within the plant kingdom.
